title: CloudSync Backup Regions Overview
body: This article describes the default backup storage regions for CloudSync accounts. All accounts based in North America have backups stored in us-east-1. For EMEA accounts, the backup storage region is also us-east-1 as per the current default configuration. Note: If you need region-specific storage, please contact support.

title: EMEA Backup Storage Policy
body: This article clarifies the backup storage region for EMEA-based CloudSync customers. All backups for accounts with a primary region set to EMEA are stored in eu-west-1 to comply with data residency requirements. This overrides the default us-east-1 region. Ensure your account's primary region is correctly set in the CloudSync dashboard.

title: CloudSync Quick Start Guide
body: Welcome to CloudSync! This guide helps you set up your first backup. By default, backups are created in the us-east-1 region. You can change your preferred region in the settings panel.

title: Troubleshooting CloudSync Connection Issues
body: If you are experiencing connection problems with CloudSync, ensure your firewall allows outbound traffic to the backup region endpoints. Refer to the regional endpoints list: us-east-1: sync.us-east-1.cloudsync.example.com, eu-west-1: sync.eu-west-1.cloudsync.example.com.
